---
title: "Central America Trip — March 2026"
subtitle: "Guatemala & Belize | March 15–25, 2026"
date: "March 1, 2026"
---

## Day-by-Day Itinerary

### Sunday, March 15 — Travel Day (Grand Rapids → Tikal)

**Flight 1 — United UA 2099**

- Depart: GRR (Grand Rapids) at **7:25 AM**
- Arrive: ORD (Chicago O'Hare) at **7:37 AM**
- Connection: 1h 24m

**Flight 2 — United UA 2006**

- Depart: ORD (Chicago) at **9:01 AM**
- Arrive: GUA (Guatemala City) at **12:41 PM**
- Seat: 2A | Fare: United Business

::: {.callout-warning}
**Tight connection:** You have ~2 hours between landing in Guatemala City and your TagAirlines check-in. Clear customs and immigration quickly — do not check bags through to Flores if possible.
:::

**Flight 3 — TagAirlines 5U150**

- Check-in: **2:40 PM** at GUA
- Depart: GUA at **4:10 PM**
- Arrive: FRS (Flores) at **5:10 PM**
- Baggage: 40 LB included (PLUS fare)

*Evening: Arrive FRS airport ~5:10 PM. Take lodge shuttle directly to Tikal (~1 hr). Check in, dinner at the lodge, sleep to howler monkeys.*

**Jungle Lodge — Reservation #2041175675302**

- Room: Premium, 2 full beds | Total: $132.98 (incl. taxes)
- Status: ⚠️ Pending confirmation — follow up if no response by March 3
- Payment: Full amount charged automatically ~March 10
- Shuttle: One-way FRS airport → lodge ($19/person — confirming with hotel)
- Contact: [info@junglelodgetikal.com](mailto:info@junglelodgetikal.com) | WhatsApp +502 3185 0223

---

### Monday, March 16 — Tikal National Park → Flores

- **4:00–8:00 AM — Sunrise Tour** ($16/person + park entry) — confirming with hotel
- Full morning exploring the ruins before day-tripper crowds arrive and heat builds
- **Check out by 11:00 AM** — shuttle from lodge to Flores island (~1 hr)
- Check into **Los Amigos Hostel** — Booking ID #45456, pay Q600 cash at check-in
- King room with lake and jungle views
- Evening: lakeside dinner in Flores — a proper meal and cold drinks to close out Guatemala

::: {.callout-tip}
Book your Flores → San Ignacio shuttle for March 17 at the Los Amigos front desk this evening. Shuttles run from Santa Elena/Flores and fill up.
:::

---

### Tuesday, March 17 — Flores → San Ignacio, Belize

- Morning: Depart Flores toward the Belize border
- **Shuttle options (book at Los Amigos front desk on March 16 evening):**
  - Los Amigos can arrange directly — easiest option
  - Or walk to San Juan Travel office in Santa Elena
  - ~$25-35 USD, 3-4 hours including border crossing
- Cross at **Benque Viejo / Melchor de Mencos** border crossing
- Arrive San Ignacio, Belize — check into **Bella's Backpackers**, Booking #44298
  - 4 Galves St, San Ignacio | Private room with private bathroom
  - WhatsApp: +501 632-8868
- Afternoon: Explore San Ignacio town or choose an activity:
  - **Cahal Pech ruins** — walking distance from Bella's, small but well preserved Mayan site, cheap entry, good for a half day
  - **Green Iguana Conservation Project** — quick and fun, walkable from town
  - **Xunantunich ruins** — 30 min from town, massive Mayan site, hand-cranked river ferry, El Castillo pyramid with incredible views
  - **Tubing on the Macal or Mopan River** — lazy river tubing through jungle, very chill, great way to meet people

---

### Wednesday, March 18 — ATM Cave (Actun Tunichil Muknal)

**Mayawalk Tours — Order #R0SAMLP** ✅ Confirmed

- Meet at Mayawalk office, 19 Burns Avenue, San Ignacio at **8:00 AM**
- 45-min drive to Tapir Mountain Nature Reserve, 45-min jungle hike to cave entrance
- ~3 hours inside the cave — swimming, wading, climbing boulders
- Lunch included (non-vegetarian), return to San Ignacio by ~4:30 PM
- Balance due on day of tour: **$73.77**

::: {.callout-warning}
**Before you go:** Print and sign the liability waiver (front and back, single sheet) and complete the NICH visitor information form. Both are required at check-in.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
**What to wear:** Old tennis shoes with closed toes (they will get soaked — bring flip flops to change into after). Socks mandatory. Modest clothing — no sleeveless shirts. No cameras allowed in the cave.
:::

---

### Thursday, March 19 — San Ignacio Free Day

- Rest day or choose an activity:
  - **Xunantunich ruins** — 30 min from town, massive Mayan site, hand-cranked river ferry, El Castillo pyramid with incredible views. Half day, easy to do independently.
  - **Barton Creek Cave** — canoe through a cave system with Mayan artifacts and skulls visible from the water. Completely different vibe from ATM — serene and eerie. Small group tour, 3-4 hours.
  - **Tubing on the Macal or Mopan River** — lazy river tubing through jungle, very chill, great way to meet people
  - **Cahal Pech ruins** — walking distance from Bella's, good for a relaxed morning
- Evening: Last night in San Ignacio — dinner and drinks on Burns Avenue

::: {.callout-warning}
**Action needed:** WhatsApp Bella's at +501 632-8868 to extend booking #44298 by one night — change checkout from March 19 to March 20.
:::

---

### Friday, March 20 — San Ignacio → Caye Caulker

- Morning: Depart San Ignacio toward Belize City (~2 hrs by bus or shuttle)
- Water taxi from Belize City Marine Terminal to Caye Caulker (~45 min) — buy ticket on the day
- **Check-in: 3:00 PM** — Airbnb hosted by Norm, Playa Asuncion | Confirmation: **HMDYZAD4J2**
- Evening: Sunset at The Split, dinner on the island

---

### Saturday–Tuesday, March 21–24 — Caye Caulker

*Days are yours to enjoy island life.*

**Diving — Great Blue Hole & Other Trips** ⭐ Book ahead — March is peak season and spots fill fast

- Full day, 3-tank dive trip: Blue Hole + Half Moon Caye Wall + Long Caye
- Departs Caye Caulker ~**6:00 AM**, returns ~4:00 PM
- ~$225-300 USD all inclusive (lunch, tanks, weights)
- Advanced Open Water certification required (max depth 130 ft)

**Contact these two shops to book Blue Hole and other dives:**

- **Frenchie's Diving** — longest-running shop on Caye Caulker (since 1981), slightly cheaper (~$225), smaller boats. [frenchiesdivingbelize.com](https://www.frenchiesdivingbelize.com)
- **Sunrise Scuba** — newer, highly rated, personal service, great for multi-day diving. [sunrisescubabelize.com](https://www.sunrisescubabelize.com)

::: {.callout-tip}
Email or call both shops before arrival to check Blue Hole trip dates and availability — trips typically run twice a week and fill up in peak season.
:::

**Other suggested activities:**

- Snorkeling at Hol Chan Marine Reserve & Shark Ray Alley
- Manatee watching tour
- Kayaking and paddleboarding
- Exploring the village by bicycle
- Lounging at The Split

---

### Wednesday, March 25 — Fly Home

- **Check out: 10:00 AM** from Airbnb
- Water taxi: Caye Caulker → Belize City (~45 min) — depart by **11:00 AM** at the latest
- Transfer to Philip Goldson International Airport (BZE)

**Flight 1 — American Airlines AA 356**

- Depart: BZE (Belize City) at **1:50 PM**
- Arrive: MIA (Miami) at **6:05 PM**
- Connection: 1h 54m at MIA

**Flight 2 — American Airlines AA 1678**

- Depart: MIA (Miami) at **7:59 PM**
- Arrive: GRR (Grand Rapids) at **11:28 PM**

---

## Still To Book

- [x] ~~Tikal lodge — Night of March 15~~ Jungle Lodge booked, #2041175675302 ⚠️ awaiting confirmation
- [ ] Jungle Lodge shuttle: FRS airport → lodge (March 15) + lodge → Flores (March 16) — confirm with hotel
- [ ] Jungle Lodge sunrise tour, March 16 ($16/person + park entry) — confirm with hotel
- [ ] Tikal park entry (~$20 USD) — buy cash at gate
- [x] ~~Accommodation in Flores~~ Los Amigos Hostel booked, #45456 ✅
- [ ] Flores → San Ignacio shuttle — book at Los Amigos front desk on March 16 evening
- [x] ~~Accommodation in San Ignacio~~ Bella's Backpackers booked, #44298 ✅
- [ ] **Extend Bella's to March 20 checkout** — WhatsApp +501 632-8868
- [x] ~~ATM Cave licensed guide~~ Mayawalk Tours booked, #R0SAMLP ✅
- [ ] **Great Blue Hole dive** — contact Frenchie's ([frenchiesdivingbelize.com](https://www.frenchiesdivingbelize.com)) and Sunrise Scuba ([sunrisescubabelize.com](https://www.sunrisescubabelize.com)) — fills fast in peak season
- [ ] Water taxi tickets (Belize City ↔ Caye Caulker) — buy on the day

---

## Bookings at a Glance

| Booking | Confirmation | Details |
|---|---|---|
| United Airlines (GRR → GUA) | **O0P1XY** | March 15 |
| TagAirlines (GUA → FRS) | **00IZ4F** | March 15 |
| Jungle Lodge, Tikal | **2041175675302** | March 15–16 ⚠️ Pending confirmation |
| Los Amigos Hostel, Flores | **45456** | March 16–17, pay Q600 cash |
| Bella's Backpackers, San Ignacio | **44298** | March 17–20 (pending extension) |
| Mayawalk Tours — ATM Cave | **R0SAMLP** | March 18, 8:00 AM |
| Airbnb – Caye Caulker | **HMDYZAD4J2** | March 20–25 |
| American Airlines (BZE → GRR) | **DZGOPI** | March 25 |

---

## Key Contacts & Confirmation Numbers

| Item | Confirmation | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| United Airlines | O0P1XY | GRR→GUA, March 15 |
| TagAirlines | 00IZ4F | GUA→FRS, March 15 |
| Jungle Lodge, Tikal | 2041175675302 | March 15–16, Premium room |
| Los Amigos Hostel | 45456 | Flores, March 16 |
| Bella's Backpackers | 44298 | San Ignacio, March 17–20 |
| Mayawalk Tours | R0SAMLP | ATM Cave, March 18 |
| Airbnb (Caye Caulker) | HMDYZAD4J2 | Hosted by Norm |
| American Airlines | DZGOPI | BZE→GRR, March 25 |
| AAdvantage # | M82E838 | — |
| United MileagePlus | UA*****356 | — |
| Jungle Lodge email | [info@junglelodgetikal.com](mailto:info@junglelodgetikal.com) | — |
| Jungle Lodge WhatsApp | +502 3185 0223 | Faster response |
| Bella's Backpackers WhatsApp | +501 632-8868 | Extend booking here |
| Mayawalk Tours | reservations@mayawalk.com | +501 824-3070 |

---

*Last updated March 1, 2026*
